[cron:0f65bca4-8d31-40d6-8d98-d1f8e1a97258 HB Trading 30m] HB Trading 30m
Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 11:00 (Europe/Madrid)

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.

Okay, here is the summary for the HB Trading 30m cron job:

Current time: Sunday, March 1st, 2026 — 11:00 (Europe/Madrid)

This is a regular 30 minute check-in for the HB Trading workflow. The key things to review are:

1. Check the current trading positions and P&L for the HB strategy. Ensure all open trades are performing as expected.
2. Review any new market data or news that may impact the HB strategy. Update the strategy parameters if needed.
3. Reconcile the trading account balances and ensure all deposits/withdrawals are accounted for.
4. Generate a brief status report to share with the trading team.

Please let me know if you need any other information or have additional tasks related to the HB Trading workflow.
